reviews.review_description:
This is amazing!!! It's exactly what I was looking for!
The controls are very clearly explained and become very intuitive after just a few times. The music is beautiful, the visuals are beautiful. 
The program allows you to create your own little rock gardens and actually enter into them and walk around. 
There is a combat element that is necessary to unlock more rocks and bridges and stuff, but it is very simple. If I can do it, anyone can 😆
This is a daily go-to program for me now.
It doesn't matter what button I press or when I press it, I can't actually rake the sand.

Beautiful app and wonderful idea that can take off if done right but the app diverts from commonly known controls and can become very confusing. I couldn’t even pick up a rake which is odd because all games use the grab feature this one does not. You create zen gardens then go inside of them which is an amazing idea but it’s not there yet. Even using the settings menus you are not able to turn anything off or on. Hope they fix it because this is beyond what I wanted. Crossing fingers! Will update stars once fixed.
I love the concept of this game, but I cannot rake the sand. It doesn’t work!! I wish so much it would work!!!
